description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a light tan, baked dough base and a generous layer of pale yellow icing covering the top surface. The icing is adorned with numerous white, elongated sprinkles scattered unevenly across its surface, adding texture and visual interest. The donut has a soft, slightly puffy appearance, with subtle pixelation suggesting a stylized or voxel-based design. The central hole is well-defined and the overall shape is round and symmetrical. The surface of the icing appears matte with a slight roughness due to the sprinkles. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the donut is presented unwrapped, as if ready to be served or displayed.
description: A round, tan donut topped with pale yellow icing and white sprinkles, featuring a soft, puffy texture and a central hole.
description_view_0: The donut is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the yellow icing and white sprinkles concentrated on the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the donut's right side, with the icing and sprinkles more evenly distributed and the central hole clearly visible.
description_view_2: The donut is viewed from the front, displaying a balanced spread of icing and sprinkles, with the central hole prominent.
description_view_3: The donut is seen from the opposite side, with the icing and sprinkles visible on the right and the central hole in clear view.
attribute_icing_type: Pale yellow sugar glaze with a matte, slightly rough texture due to sprinkles.
